---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r setup-socbehav, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, results = 'markup', warning = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(reshape2)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(viridis)
library(ggdist)

library(brms)
library(rstan)
library(cmdstanr)
library(tidybayes)
library(bayesplot)
library(randtoolbox)


# Change wd
setwd("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/rlforaging")

```
```{r, directories, include=FALSE}
if(!dir.exists("social/results")){dir.create("social/results")}
if(!dir.exists("social/results/behavioural")){dir.create("social/results/behavioural")}

```



```{r, recompute-socbehav}
recompute = TRUE
```

```{r, data-socbehav, echo=TRUE}
# Read data
path = "~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesis/data/data_discrete_1s.csv"
d = read.csv(path,colClasses = c(rep(NA, 8), rep("character", 2), rep(NA, 4)))

# Set player id unique across sessions
d = d %>% mutate(id = (session - 1) * 5  + player) %>%
  mutate(id = factor(id, levels = c(1:max(id))))

d = d %>%
  mutate(max.fac = factor(max.fac, levels = c(1:3))) %>%
  mutate(ratio.fac = factor(ratio.fac, levels = c(1:4))) %>%
  mutate(social.fac = factor(social.fac, levels = c(1:3))) %>%
  mutate(cond = interaction(max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac)) %>%
  mutate(session = factor(session, levels=1:max(session)))

# Get  trials
d = d %>% filter(social.fac %in% c(1, 2))

# Compute observed decisions (as was done for synthetic data)
d=d %>%
  mutate(decision = correct) %>% mutate(reward = catch) %>% mutate(nplayers = 5) %>%
  mutate(time = time.rounded)

```

#### Accuracy 
```{r, acc}
# Set priors
formula = bf(decision ~ cond + (1|session) + (1|id))

get_prior(formula = formula, data = d, family = bernoulli(link = "logit"))

prior = c(prior(exponential(2), clas="sd", group="id"),
          prior(exponential(2), clas="sd", group="session"))

# Fit model
m1 = brm(formula = formula, data = d, family = bernoulli(link = logit),
          prior = prior,
          chains = 4, cores = 4,
          iter=4000, warmup=2000, refresh=400)


m1

saveRDS(m1, paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "acc.rds", sep="/"))

# Plot posterior means + hdis for asocial condition
m1.draws = tidy_draws(m1) %>% dplyr::select(contains(c("b"))) %>%
  mutate(b_cond1.1.1 = 0) %>%
  mutate(sample = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("b_cond"), names_to = "cond", values_to = "condoffset") %>%
  mutate(post = b_Intercept + condoffset) %>%
  mutate(post = inv_logit_scaled(post)) %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("b_cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>%
  mean_hdi(post, .width = .9) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(post, .lower, .upper), round, digits=2) %>%
  mutate(max.fac = factor(max.fac, levels=1:3))

p1 = m1.draws %>% filter(social.fac == 1) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ratio.fac, col=max.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(aes(y=post, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = .3), size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, lty=2) +
  ylim(0.4, 1) +
  labs(y="p") +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p1

p2 = m1.draws %>% filter(social.fac == 2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ratio.fac, col=max.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(aes(y=post, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = .3), size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, lty=2) +
  ylim(0.4, 1) +
  labs(y="p") +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p2



# Plot contrast social setting
con = tidy_draws(m1) %>% dplyr::select(contains(c("b"))) %>%
  mutate(b_cond1.1.1 = 0) %>%
  mutate(sample = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("b_cond"), names_to = "cond", values_to = "condoffset") %>%
  mutate(post = b_Intercept + condoffset) %>%
  mutate(post = inv_logit_scaled(post)) %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("b_cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) %>%
  group_by(sample, max.fac, ratio.fac) %>%
  arrange(sample, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>%
  reframe(contrast = diff(post)) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(contrast, .lower, .upper), round, digits=3) %>%
  mutate(max.fac = factor(max.fac, levels=1:3))


p3 = con %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ratio.fac, col=max.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(aes(y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = .3), size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2) +
  ylim(-.12, .12) +
  labs(x="Yield Ratio", y=bquote(paste(Delta, "p" ))) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p3

# p = ggarrange(p1, p3, nrow = 2, labels = c("a", "b"), 
#               font.label = list(size=rel(30)), common.legend = T, legend = "right")
p = ggarrange(p1, p3, nrow = 2, labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)), common.legend = T, legend = "top")
p
ggexport(p, width = 2560, height = 1440, 
         filename = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "modacc.jpeg", sep = "/"))

# Plot as a function of difference in catch probabilities
m1.draws = m1.draws %>% 
    mutate(ratio = ifelse(ratio.fac == 1, .5,
                          ifelse(ratio.fac == 2, .65,
                                 ifelse(ratio.fac == 3, .8, .95)))) %>%
    mutate(max = ifelse(max.fac == 1, .5, 
                        ifelse(max.fac == 2, .7, .9))) %>%
    mutate(l=ratio*max, u=max, d=u-l)

p1 = m1.draws %>% filter(social.fac == 1) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=d, y=post, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper)) + 
  geom_pointrange(size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, lty=2) +
  ylim(0.4, 1) +
  labs(y="p") +
  #scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p1

con = con %>%
  mutate(ratio = ifelse(ratio.fac == 1, .5,
                          ifelse(ratio.fac == 2, .65,
                                 ifelse(ratio.fac == 3, .8, .95)))) %>%
  mutate(max = ifelse(max.fac == 1, .5, 
                      ifelse(max.fac == 2, .7, .9))) %>%
  mutate(l=ratio*max, u=max, d=u-l)

p2 = con %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=d, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, group=max.fac, col=max.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x="d", y=bquote(paste(Delta, "p" ))) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p2

p3 = con %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=d, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, group=ratio.fac, col=ratio.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x="d", y=bquote(paste(Delta, "p" ))) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p3

p = ggarrange(p1, 
              ggarrange(p2, p3, labels = c("b", "c"), font.label = list(size=rel(30))),
              nrow = 2, labels = c("a"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)), common.legend = T, legend = "top")
p
ggexport(p, width = 2560, height = 1440, 
         filename = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "modacc_d.jpeg", sep = "/"))


```

#### Accuracy over time
```{r, acc-time}
# d.sub = d %>% filter(session %in% c(1) & time %in% c(1:10) )

# Use cmdstanr
options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr")

# Output dir
outdir = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "cmdstanout", sep="/")
if(!dir.exists(outdir)){dir.create(outdir)}

# Log file
log.txt = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "cmdstanout", "acctime_fixed_log.txt", sep="/")

# Sink
sink(log.txt, append = T)


formula = bf(decision ~ mo(time) * cond  + (1|session) + (1|id))


m2 = brm(data = d, family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
         formula = formula,
         chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000, refresh=1,
         output_dir = outdir)
saveRDS(m2, paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "acctime_fixed.rds", sep="/"))
sink()


plot(conditional_effects(m2))

draws = tidy_draws(m2)


# Intercept and cond at t == 0
cond = draws %>% 
  # Main effect of condition
  mutate("b_cond1.1.1" = 0) %>%
  select(contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw", "b_cond", "Intercept"))) %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("b_cond"), names_to = "cond", values_to = "b_cond") %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("b_cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) %>% 
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>% 
  reframe(b_cond = Intercept + b_Intercept + b_cond) 


# Sum simplex time
motime = draws %>%
  select(contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw", "simo_motime1", "bsp_motime"))) %>% select(!contains("bsp_motime:cond")) %>%
  mutate("simo_motime1[0]" = 0) %>%
  pivot_longer(!contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw", "bsp_motime")), names_to = "time", values_to = "simplex_time") %>%
  mutate(time = gsub("simo_motime1", "", time)) %>%
  mutate(time=parse_number(time)) %>%
  #mutate(time=as.integer(time + 1)) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, bsp_motime) %>%
  arrange(.chain, .iteration, .draw, bsp_motime, time) %>%
  mutate(simplex_time = cumsum(simplex_time)) %>%
  mutate(duration = max(time)) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, time) %>%
  reframe(motime = bsp_motime * duration * simplex_time)

# Check
# post = merge(cond, motime) %>%
#   mutate(decision = b_cond + motime) %>%
#   group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>%
#   reframe(decision = mean(inv_logit_scaled(decision)))
# post %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x=time, y=decision, col=max.fac)) + geom_line() +
#   ylim(0, 1)


# Sum simplex timecond
motimecond = draws %>%
  select(contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw", "simo_motime:cond"))) %>%
  cbind(
    matrix(0, nrow = nrow(draws), ncol = length(paste0("simo_motime:cond1.1.1[", 0:(max(d$time)), "]"))) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
      `colnames<-`(paste0("simo_motime:cond1.1.1[", 0:(max(d$time)), "]"))
    ) %>%
  cbind(
    matrix(0, nrow = nrow(draws), ncol=length(paste0("simo_motime:cond", sort(unique(d$cond)), "[", 0, "]"))) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
      `colnames<-`(paste0("simo_motime:cond", sort(unique(d$cond)), "[", 0, "]"))
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(!contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw")), names_to = "time_cond", values_to = "simplex_timecond") %>%
  mutate(time_cond = gsub("simo_motime:cond", "", time_cond)) %>%
  mutate(cond = sub("\\[.*", "", time_cond)) %>%
  mutate(time = parse_number(gsub(".*\\[", "", time_cond))) %>%
  #mutate(time = time + 1) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) %>%
  mutate(social.fac = ifelse(social.fac == "11", "1", ifelse(social.fac == "21", "2", social.fac))) %>% ###################################
  select(-time_cond) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>%
  arrange(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>%
  mutate(simplex_timecond = cumsum(simplex_timecond)) 

# B timecond
btimecond = draws %>% select(contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw", "bsp_motime:cond"))) %>%
  mutate("bsp_motime:cond1.1.1" = 0) %>%
  pivot_longer(!contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw")), names_to = "cond", values_to = "b_timecond") %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("bsp_motime:cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) 

motimecond = merge(motimecond, btimecond) %>% 
  mutate(duration = max(time)) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>%
  reframe(motimecond = b_timecond * duration * simplex_timecond)
  



post = merge(merge(cond, motime), motimecond) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>% 
  reframe(decision = b_cond + motime + motimecond) 



#### Plot ####
ratio.labs = paste("Yield Ratio:", sort(unique(d$ratio)))
names(ratio.labs) = sort(unique(post$ratio.fac))

max.labs = paste("Maximum Yield", sort(unique(d$max)))
names(max.labs) = sort(unique(post$max.fac))

facet.labeller = labeller(ratio.fac = ratio.labs, max.fac = max.labs)

# Plot asocial learning curve
plot.data = post %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>% 
  mean_hdi(decision, .width = .9) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(decision, .lower, .upper), inv_logit_scaled)

p1 = plot.data %>% filter(social.fac == 1) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=decision, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, col=max.fac, fill=max.fac)) +
  geom_line(lwd=1) +
  geom_lineribbon(alpha=.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept =  0.5, lty=2) +
  labs(x="Time", y="p") +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8)+
  scale_fill_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_wrap( ~  ratio.fac, ncol=4, labeller = facet.labeller)

# Plot contrast
# Plot asocial learning curve
plot.data = post %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate_at(vars(decision), inv_logit_scaled) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, time) %>% 
  arrange(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, time, social.fac) %>%
  #mutate(contrast = decision[which(social.fac==2)] - decision[which(social.fac == 1)])
  reframe(contrast = diff(decision)) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, time) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9)

p2 = plot.data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, col=max.fac, fill=max.fac)) +
  geom_line(lwd=1) +
  geom_lineribbon(alpha=.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept =  0, lty=2) +
  labs(x="Time", y=bquote(paste(Delta, "p" ))) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8)+
  scale_fill_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) +
  facet_wrap( ~  ratio.fac, ncol=4, labeller = facet.labeller)


p = ggarrange(p1, p2, nrow = 2,
              labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)), common.legend = T, legend = "top")
ggexport(p, width = 2560, height = 1440,
         filename = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "modacctime.jpeg", sep="/"))

  

# Plot asocial learning curve contrast relative to max == 1
plot.data = post %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(decision = inv_logit_scaled(decision)) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = ifelse(max.fac == 2, decision[which(max.fac == 2)] - decision[which(max.fac==1)],
                           ifelse(max.fac == 3, decision[which(max.fac==3)] - decision[which(max.fac == 1)], NA))) %>%
  drop_na(contrast) %>%
  group_by(ratio.fac, max.fac, time) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9)

plot.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, col=max.fac, fill=max.fac)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_lineribbon(alpha=.5) +
  facet_wrap( ~  ratio.fac)

# Plot asocial learning curve contrast relative to max == 2
plot.data = post %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(decision = inv_logit_scaled(decision)) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, ratio.fac, social.fac, time) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = ifelse(max.fac == 3, decision[which(max.fac == 3)] - decision[which(max.fac==2)], NA)) %>%
  drop_na(contrast) %>%
  group_by(ratio.fac, max.fac, time) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9)

plot.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, col=max.fac, fill=max.fac)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_lineribbon(alpha=.5) +
  facet_wrap( ~  ratio.fac)

# Plot asocial learning curve contrast to ratio == 1
plot.data = post %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(decision = inv_logit_scaled(decision)) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, social.fac, time) %>% 
  mutate(contrast = ifelse(ratio.fac == 2, decision[which(ratio.fac == 2)] - decision[which(ratio.fac==1)],
                           ifelse(ratio.fac == 3, decision[which(ratio.fac == 3)] - decision[which(ratio.fac==1)], 
                                  ifelse(ratio.fac == 4, decision[which(ratio.fac == 4)] - decision[which(ratio.fac==1)], NA)))) %>%
  drop_na(contrast) %>%
  group_by(ratio.fac, max.fac, time) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9)

plot.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper, col=ratio.fac, fill=ratio.fac)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_lineribbon(alpha=.5) +
  facet_wrap( ~  max.fac)


# Contrast between social conditions
contrast = post %>% ungroup() %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, time) %>% 
  arrange(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac, time, social.fac) %>%
  mutate(decision = inv_logit_scaled(decision)) %>%
  mutate(contrast = diff(decision)) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, time) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9)


contrast%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=time, y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_lineribbon(alpha=.5) +
  facet_grid(ratio.fac ~  max.fac)

# Compute contrasts for table
bmotime = draws %>%
  select(contains(c(".chain", ".iteration", ".draw", "bsp_motime"))) %>%
  mutate("bsp_motime:cond1.1.1" = 0) %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("cond"), names_to = "cond", values_to = "cond_offset") %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("bsp_motime:cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) 

post = bmotime %>%
  mutate(post = bsp_motime + cond_offset) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>%
  mean_hdi(post, .width = .9) %>%
  filter(social.fac == 1) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(post, .lower, .upper), round, digits=3)

con = bmotime %>%
  mutate(post = bsp_motime + cond_offset) %>%
  group_by(.chain, .iteration, .draw, max.fac, ratio.fac) %>%
  reframe(contrast = post[which(social.fac == 2)] - post[which(social.fac == 1)]) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(contrast, .lower, .upper), round, digits=3)



```

#### Switch rate 
```{r, switch}
d = d %>%
  group_by(session, trial, id) %>%
  arrange(session, trial, id, time) %>%
  mutate(switch = ifelse(decision != lag(decision), 1, 0)) %>%
  drop_na(switch)

# Formula
formula = bf(switch ~ cond +  (1|session) + (1|id))

# Fit model
m3 = brm(formula = formula, data = d, family = bernoulli(link = logit),
          chains = 4, cores = 4,
          iter=4000, warmup=2000, refresh=200)


m3

saveRDS(m3, paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "switch.rds", sep="/"))

# Plot posterior means + hdis for asocial condition
m3.draws = tidy_draws(m3) %>% dplyr::select(contains(c("b"))) %>%
  mutate(b_cond1.1.1 = 0) %>%
  mutate(sample = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("b_cond"), names_to = "cond", values_to = "condoffset") %>%
  mutate(post = b_Intercept + condoffset) %>%
  mutate(post = inv_logit_scaled(post)) %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("b_cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>%
  mean_hdi(post, .width = .9) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(post, .lower, .upper), round, digits=3) %>%
  mutate(max.fac = factor(max.fac, levels=1:3))

p1 = m3.draws %>% filter(social.fac == 1) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ratio.fac, col=max.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(aes(y=post, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = .3), size=1, lwd=1) + 
  labs(y="s") +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p1

p2 = m3.draws %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ratio.fac, col=max.fac, shape=as.factor(social.fac))) + 
  geom_pointrange(aes(y=post, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = .3), size=1, lwd=1) + 
  labs(y="s") +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p2


# Plot contrast social setting
con = tidy_draws(m3) %>% dplyr::select(contains(c("b"))) %>%
  mutate(b_cond1.1.1 = 0) %>%
  mutate(sample = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(contains("b_cond"), names_to = "cond", values_to = "condoffset") %>%
  mutate(post = b_Intercept + condoffset) %>%
  mutate(post = inv_logit_scaled(post)) %>%
  mutate(cond = gsub("b_cond", "", cond)) %>%
  separate(cond, into = c("max.fac", "ratio.fac", "social.fac")) %>%
  group_by(sample, max.fac, ratio.fac) %>%
  arrange(sample, max.fac, ratio.fac, social.fac) %>%
  reframe(contrast = diff(post)) %>%
  group_by(max.fac, ratio.fac) %>%
  mean_hdi(contrast, .width = .9) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(contrast, .lower, .upper), round, digits=3) %>%
  mutate(max.fac = factor(max.fac, levels=1:3))


p3 = con %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=ratio.fac, col=max.fac)) + 
  geom_pointrange(aes(y=contrast, ymin=.lower, ymax=.upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = .3), size=1, lwd=1) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty=2) +
  labs(x="Yield Ratio", y=bquote(paste(Delta, "s" ))) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Maximum Yield", labels = c("0.50", "0.70", "0.90"),
                      discrete = T, end = .8) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Yield Ratio", labels = c("0.50", "0.65", "0.80", "0.95")) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(text = element_text(size=rel(5)),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        legend.text = element_text(size=rel(7)), 
        legend.title = element_text(size=rel(7)),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = rel(8)),
        plot.margin = margin(1,1,1,1, "cm")) 
p3

# p = ggarrange(p1, p3, nrow = 2, labels = c("a", "b"), 
#               font.label = list(size=rel(30)), common.legend = T, legend = "right")
p = ggarrange(p1, p3, nrow = 2, labels = c("a", "b"), font.label = list(size=rel(30)), common.legend = T, legend = "top")
p
ggexport(p, width = 2560, height = 1440, 
         filename = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "modswitch.jpeg", sep = "/"))

```

#### Switch rate over time test ####
```{r, switch-time}
d = d %>%
  group_by(session, trial, id) %>%
  arrange(session, trial, id, time) %>%
  mutate(switch = ifelse(decision == lag(decision), 1, 0)) %>%
  drop_na(switch)

# Use cmdstanr
options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr")

# Output dir
outdir = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "cmdstanout_switchtime", sep="/")
if(!dir.exists(outdir)){dir.create(outdir)}

# Log file
log.txt = paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "cmdstanout_switchtime", "switchtime_log.txt", sep="/")

# Sink
sink(log.txt, append = T)


formula = bf(switch ~ mo(time) * cond + (1|session) + (1|id))


m4 = brm(data = d, family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
         formula = formula,
         chains = 4, cores = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000, refresh=1,
         output_dir = outdir)
saveRDS(m4, paste("~/Users/MarienhagenJonathan/thesisvc/social/results/behav", "switchtime.rds", sep="/"))
sink()
```
